title: Poached Fish Wrap
description: A light and refreshing British-inspired dish featuring poached fish in a silky wrap.

ingredients.name: fish fillets
ingredients.notes: Any white fish works well, such as cod or haddock.

ingredients.name: silky wrap
ingredients.notes: A gluten-free wrap or tortilla is best.

instructions: Preheat a large skillet or sauté pan over medium heat.
Add the olive oil and gently place the fish fillets in the pan.
Poach the fish for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the wraps in a toaster or under the broiler.
Place a cooked fish fillet on each wrap, followed by a squeeze of lemon juice (if using).
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
